/usr/bin/c++ -g -D_GLIBCXX_DEBUG CMakeFiles/NewsTransformer.dir/NewsTransformer_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NewsTransformer.dir/DataExtraction.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NewsTransformer.dir/DataStore.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NewsTransformer.dir/Main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NewsTransformer.dir/SentimentScorer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/NewsTransformer.dir/logs.cpp.o -o bin/NewsTransformer  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Network.so.6.2.4 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Sql.so.6.2.4 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.2.4
